resources.string: ParentingMyKid keeps children safe: enforces app blocks, optional app lock, and works with your parent settings. Turn this on only if you are the parent or with parent consent.
Network protection is active on this device
VPN settings are locked while ParentingMyKid protections are on. Ask a parent if you need help.
Tap the floating PMK button to switch modes instantly
You\'ve reached today\'s play time for this game. Time to take a break!
Play time for this game is used up for today.
You used your play time wisely today. We\'ll have more fun tomorrow — rest and come back fresh!
Time left in this game\'s budget
Kid mode on · tap for snapshot
You\'re in Kid mode. Play-time limits appear when you open a game.
Kid mode is on. Open a game to see remaining play time.
YouTube Shorts / Reels are turned off for you. Regular videos are OK when your parent allows YouTube.
Long videos are not allowed on this device by your parent.
